repos.name: polymarket-volume-bot
repos.description: Volume-based Polymarket trading bot - detects unusual volume spikes, momentum shifts, and accumulation patterns across prediction markets. Automatically enters on volume triggers and exits when momentum fades.

repos.name: polymarket-arb-bot
repos.description: Automated cross-market arbitrage bot for Polymarket and Kalshi - detects price discrepancies on identical events and executes both legs simultaneously to lock in risk-free spreads of 1.5-8%.
